title: Senior Software Engineer - Agentic AI
company_focus: Supply chain software and logistics solutions
description:
Job Description:

About the Role

Kaleris is looking for a Senior Software Engineer with deep
expertise in agentic AI systems, LLM orchestration, and
production-scale deployment. You will shape and deliver
strategic GenAI features, mentor team members, and drive
applied AI projects utilizing frameworks like LangGraph.

Responsibilities

- Architect and lead development of advanced agentic AI
  systems using LangGraph or similar frameworks.
- Own the full model lifecycle: research, solution design,
  prototyping, optimization, testing, and production
  deployment.
- Lead and mentor the AI team, setting best practices for
  model quality, scalability, and responsible AI.
- Integrate LLMs with enterprise data, orchestration systems,
  and workflow automation (RAG, vector search, API
  development).
- Collaborate with engineering, product, and business
  stakeholders to define AI-driven product features and
  roadmaps.
- Conduct technical reviews, establish coding standards, and
  ensure codebase robustness.
- Optimize AI infrastructure for performance, cost, and
  reliability (cloud, MLOps, container orchestration).
- Champion innovation: stay ahead of industry trends, bring
  actionable insights and drive adoption of new AI
  technologies.
- Ensure AI model governance, fairness, and compliance with
  ethical/organizational standards.

Requirements

- Bachelor’s or Master’s (PhD a plus) in Computer Science,
  Engineering, or related field.
- 5+ years building and deploying AI/ML systems (at least 2+
  years with LLMs or agentic frameworks in production).
  Proven track record building agentic patterns (ReAct,
  Agentic Loops), multi-agent systems, and graph-based
  orchestration engines.
- Proven experience with Python, LLM technologies, advanced
  prompt engineering, and agent workflows (LangGraph,
  LangChain, CrewAI), async programming (asyncio), and
  backend frameworks (FastAPI, Django).
- Deep understanding of cloud AI platforms (AWS/Azure),
  containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and CI/CD for ML
  ops.
- Demonstrated leadership in AI solution design, code and
  architecture reviews, and mentoring junior engineers.
- Experience with retrieval pipelines, vector databases, and
  cloud-native architectures.
- Proficient with full-stack AI development: APIs,
  microservices, data pipelines.
- Strong knowledge of MLOps tools, monitoring, versioning, and
  responsible AI.
- Excellent communication, influencing, and cross-team
  collaboration skills.
- Intellectual curiosity, a drive for innovation, and a
  passion for making an impact with AI.

Highly Desired

- Experience building enterprise agentic AI or autonomous
  workflow orchestration systems.
- Expertise with neural search, advanced RAG, and enterprise
  data integration.
- Certifications in AI/ML, cloud, or relevant technologies.
- Logistics/supply chain software experience is a strong plus.

Why Join Kaleris?

- Competitive salary & comprehensive benefits
- Inclusive, diverse, and collaborative team culture
- The chance to build AI products at the frontier of agentic
  intelligence for supply chain

Kaleris is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate
diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive
environment for all employees.

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is ai-first because it involves hands-on work
building and deploying agentic AI systems using LangGraph
and similar frameworks. The engineer will architect agentic
systems, own the full model lifecycle from prototyping to
production deployment, and work directly with LLM
orchestration, RAG systems, and multi-agent architectures.
